titleStmt.title: SII 4.712: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 712. (A.R. No. 260 of 1892). ON A PILLAR OF THE RUINED KANAKADURGA-mandapa AT THE FOOT OF THE INDRAKILA HILL AT BEZWADA, BEZWADA TALUK, KISTNA DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī . Āsīdveṁggigrāmavāstavyavipraḥ kkalyāṇa¨rddhi[¨r*]maṁtrikalyāṇadē
vaḥ . tasyāpatyaṁ kkauśikō maṁtrisōmassōmāṁghryabjēṁddiṁddirō
bhūtprabhu¨ryyaḥ [. 1*] tasyābhūddha¨rmmapatnī suguṇagaṇavatī bo
llamāṁbōllasadgī¨rjjātastābhyāmubhābhyāmativimalamati
¨rmmaṁtrirāyassurāyaḥ . yaṣṣāḍguṇyapravīṇaḥ pravila
sadabhalōpāyapārāyaṇō yassārāpastaṁbasūtradvija
kulatilakastaṁtravinmaṁtriva¨ryyaḥ [. 2*] sōyaṁ supuṇyaniratō
makaraṁgatē¨rkkē mātaṁggaviśvajagatipramitē śakābdē . prā
dādakhaṁḍataradīpakamā¨rkkatārānmallēśvarāya beja
vāḍapurēśvarāya [. 3*] śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1138 dagunēṁ
ṭi yuttarāyaṇasaṁkrāṁttinimittamuna śrīmanmahāmaṁ
ḍalika goṁṭūri Odayarājula samastasēnādhipatiyaina
rāyanapeggaḍa mallēśvaraśrīmahādēvaraku Akhaṁḍadīpa
munaku Iccina InupaEḍlu 55 . vīniṁ jēkoni vēlēṭi
mallenabōyuṁḍu tana putrānupautrikamuna
sānyaṁbāṭi mānikanu nitya māneṁḍu neI Ācaṁdrā¨rkkamu na
ḍapaṁgalavāru . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā Ō harēti vasuṁdhara śaṣṭi¨rvva¨rṣa
sahasrāṇi viṣṭāĀṁ jāAtē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 4.712 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
